metadata.description: JapanFold — hosted biomolecular structure prediction & binder design on Tenstorrent.

plugins.name: japanfold
plugins.description: Fold proteins/complexes and estimate binding affinity (Boltz-2, ESMFold2, Protenix) and design de-novo binders (BoltzGen) via the free JapanFold HTTP API. No API key or local GPU needed.
